name: RPG on My little pony! (Equestria)
description:
I don't know if there are such bots for mlp, but in any case I tried to add as many key characters and places as possible (you can see this by reading the descriptions), but if you have ideas on what else to add here, then write in the reviews! I'm an amateur in this business, so don't scold me too much :)

and also, i tested it on DeepSeek proxy and everything was perfect. so advice: connect it and enjoy life! DeepSeek is really a very good model, in any case better than the standard model of Janitorai
creator: Озаки Мак
